name: PlantUML
description_en: Generate PlantUML diagrams from text descriptions and convert them to PNG/SVG—covering UML (sequence, class, activity, state, component, deployment, use case) and non-UML (ER, Gantt, JSON/YAML, mind maps, WBS, network, wireframes), plus extracting diagrams from Markdown for Confluence.
description_zh: 从文字描述生成 PlantUML 图并转换为 PNG/SVG——覆盖 UML(时序、类、活动、状态、组件、部署、用例)与非 UML(ER、甘特、JSON/YAML、思维导图、WBS、网络、线框),并支持从 Markdown 提取图、适配 Confluence。
long_en: Turns prose into a wide range of diagram types and renders them to images, so diagrams live as version-controllable text rather than binary files.
long_zh: 把文字变成多种图表类型并渲染为图片,让图以可版本控制的文本形式存在,而非二进制文件。
sec_note_en: Requires a local PlantUML/Java toolchain to render images; runs locally on the text you provide.
sec_note_zh: 渲染图片需要本地的 PlantUML/Java 工具链;在本地对你提供的文本运行。
